## ExtractMutationPayload type

Returns the payload for a mutation given the module name and the mutation name.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare type ExtractMutationPayload<ModuleName extends XModuleName, MutationName extends MutationNamesFor<ModuleName>> = ExtractPayload<ExtractMutations<XModulesTree[ModuleName]>[MutationName]>;
```
